skill.name: employment-contract-templates
skill.description: Create employment offer letters, employment agreements, handbook policy sections, and HR document templates with legal review reminders.
skill.summary: Draft structured employment documents with placeholders, policy language, and legal review guidance.
skill.author: wshobson

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged Markdown fences, legal wording, and resource links as risky patterns, but review found no executable code, command invocation, or automatic network behavior. No prompt injection, data exfiltration, or malicious intent was found in SKILL.md. The skill is legal-template content and should be used with qualified legal review.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Fences Flagged as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged backticks in SKILL.md, but these lines open or close Markdown blocks for diagrams and legal templates. No shell command, Ruby execution, or user-controlled execution path is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The locations are Markdown code fence delimiters or template content, not Ruby backtick execution. There is no surrounding executable script or command interpreter context.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Informational Resource Links
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URLs point to public HR and government resources. The skill contains links only; it does not fetch data, transmit user content, or contact external services automatically.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URLs are presented as reading resources in Markdown. No code path performs network requests or exfiltrates data.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Legal Text Flagged as Crypto or Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: The weak-crypto and reconnaissance alerts correspond to ordinary legal, compensation, PTO, holiday, conflict, and clarity text. No cryptographic API, system probe, host inspection, or environment access is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed lines are natural-language legal template content. I found no executable code, cryptographic function, or system reconnaissance behavior at these locations.

content.user_title: Draft Employment Documents With Legal Templates
content.value_statement: Employment documents need consistent language and careful legal review. This skill provides structured templates for offers, agreements, and handbook policies.
actual_capabilities: Drafts offer letters with role, compensation, benefits, contingencies, and acceptance sections.
Creates employment agreement structures with duties, compensation, confidentiality, termination, and general provisions.
Provides employee handbook policy language for equal opportunity, harassment, attendance, PTO, technology, and social media.
Includes placeholders for company, employee, jurisdiction, dates, compensation, and policy details.
Adds reminders to consult qualified counsel and adapt documents to local employment law.
limitations: It does not provide legal advice or replace attorney review.
It does not verify current federal, state, local, or international employment law.
It does not determine whether clauses are enforceable in a specific jurisdiction.
It does not automate signing, storage, compliance tracking, or HR system updates.

use_cases.title: Prepare a Candidate Offer Letter
use_cases.description: Create a clear offer letter with compensation, benefits, contingencies, at-will language, and signature fields.

use_cases.title: Standardize Employment Agreements
use_cases.description: Draft a reusable agreement framework for new hires, then send it to counsel for jurisdiction-specific review.

use_cases.title: Build Handbook Policy Sections
use_cases.description: Create consistent policy language for workplace conduct, attendance, PTO, technology use, and acknowledgments.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Basic Offer Letter
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an offer letter for [role] at [company]. Include compensation, benefits, contingencies, at-will language, start date, and acceptance fields.

prompt_templates.title: Customize an Employment Agreement
prompt_templates.prompt: Draft an employment agreement for [employee type] in [jurisdiction]. Include duties, compensation, confidentiality, IP assignment, termination, governing law, and counsel review notes.

prompt_templates.title: Draft Handbook Policies
prompt_templates.prompt: Create handbook policy sections for [company type]. Include equal employment opportunity, anti-harassment, attendance, PTO, technology use, and employee acknowledgment.

prompt_templates.title: Review Document Completeness
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this employment document for missing template sections, unclear placeholders, risky promises, and items that require local legal counsel review: [paste document].

output_examples.input: Draft an offer letter for a full-time marketing manager with salary, benefits, background check, and at-will language.
output_examples.output: A polished offer letter with position details, compensation, benefits, contingencies, at-will notice, acceptance deadline, and signature lines.

output_examples.input: Create a handbook policy section for anti-harassment, attendance, PTO, and technology use.
output_examples.output: A handbook-ready policy section with headings, employee obligations, reporting procedures, monitoring notice, and acknowledgment language.

output_examples.input: Review this employment agreement for missing standard clauses.
output: Flags placeholders that need business input.
Lists topics requiring jurisdiction-specific legal review.

best_practices: Collect jurisdiction, employment type, compensation, benefits, and policy details before drafting.
Keep legal disclaimers and send final documents to qualified counsel before use.
Replace every placeholder and confirm that promises match approved company policy.
anti_patterns: Do not use generic templates without local legal review.
Do not promise permanent employment, guaranteed bonuses, or benefits that the company has not approved.
Do not use restrictive covenants without checking current enforceability rules.

faq.question: Can this skill replace an employment lawyer?
faq.answer: No. It creates draft templates and review checklists, but qualified legal counsel should approve final documents.

faq.question: Does it support offer letters?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes offer letter structure for role details, pay, benefits, contingencies, at-will language, and acceptance.

faq.question: Can it draft employee handbook policies?
faq.answer: Yes. It provides sample policy sections for equal opportunity, harassment, attendance, PTO, technology, and social media.

faq.question: Does it know current employment law?
faq.answer: No. Employment law changes often, so users must verify current requirements for each jurisdiction.

faq.question: Can it handle non-compete clauses?
faq.answer: It can include placeholder language, but enforceability varies widely and requires legal review.

faq.question: Which AI tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The marketplace record lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
